submissions.synthesis_method: Textbook inverse QFT7: H + cs_dag/cr3_dag..cr7_dag on counting wires, then bit-reversal swaps (0↔6,1↔5,2↔4) for raw big-endian matrix.
Cycle decomposition of controlled y→2y mod 21; transpositions as adjacent c5x with X-conjugation for 0-controls (X–c5x–X idle when q0=0).
